properties.Test Case: Accessible: Set L1 to language X. Make a new book, add a picture page and publish. Ensure: Accessible feature reads "Accessible to the Visually Impaired in X"; it is disabled; tooltip says "This is disabled because this book does not have any image descriptions in the primary language." Add an image description and re-publish. Ensure: Accessible feature is available but is not checked by default; tooltip says "Select this if you want to list this book as accessible to the visually impaired in the primary language. This only affects how the book is categorized, it does not affect the content of the book." Publish book to web with and without the box checked and verify results.
